title: Subscribe Totem
description: A stylish Subscribe Totem pack designed for content creators, replacing the Totem of Undying with a reminder to subscribe.
body:
This resource pack replaces the Totem of Undying with a custom Subscribe design.
It is purely cosmetic and does not change any gameplay mechanics, stats, or functionality.

The pack is designed for content creators and players who want a clear visual reminder to subscribe during gameplay, recordings, or streams.
It works in vanilla Minecraft and is compatible with singleplayer and multiplayer servers that allow resource packs.

No mods are required — simply install and enable the pack like any other standard resource pack.
